message:
fix(supervision): cap exponential backoff exponent to prevent overflow

The exponential backoff computation used attempt count directly as the
powi() exponent. After ~30 retries, large exponents produce infinity
or f64 overflow, causing Duration::from_secs_f64 to panic. Cap the
exponent at 30 (2^30 ≈ 1 billion multiplier), which is well beyond
any practical backoff ceiling given that max duration is also clamped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
